title: selaginella molliceps
intro: Selaginella molliceps is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella molliceps include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
